case_title: BXI SAN FCO DBA ROBERT DORENSTREICH VS LIU MING ATOZTEC INVESTM INC.

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $600.00 FILED BY BXI SAN FCO DBA ROBERT DORENSTREICH AS TO DEFENDANT LIU MING ATOZTEC INVESTM INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-11-1995 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C
